_meta.purpose: House- and mode-effect priors for src/sim/poll_consensus.py:consensus().
_meta.convention: Subtractive bias on raw vote share (p_tilde = y - house - mode). Positive value = pollster/mode is biased UP for the leader; negative = biased DOWN.
_meta.scale_caveat: Values bounded conservatively to ±0.02 (≈±2pp). These are seeded priors for the hackathon, not fitted estimates.
sources: https://newtamsa.org/news/o7XnaH (보수과표집 — 갤럽·리얼미터 평균 약 5pp 보수 편향, 여기서는 보수적으로 ±0.01~0.02 클램프)
